name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We monitor accounts payable aging reports instead of manual tracking of payment deadlines.
problem_solved: Late payments causing cash flow gaps
features: Simple dashboard for aging report overview
